title: Add durable run state, artifact, and worktree planner
description: Add deterministic durable state primitives for the Pi orchestrator: repo slug, run id, branch names, worktree paths, per-tick prompt/report/log artifact paths, runner-state notes, and recovery discovery from git + .tick + artifacts. Include worktree path planning first; actual child execution can remain stubbed.
acceptance_criteria: Worktree/branch/artifact names are deterministic and collision-resistant. /ticks-run --dry-run --worktrees prints planned paths. Tests cover repo slugging, run id/path generation, stale artifact discovery, and no reliance on Pi session IDs.
